description_long: This nightstand features a simple, modern design with clean lines and a rectangular silhouette. The front face displays two spacious drawers, each equipped with a centered round knob for easy access. The top surface is flat and extends slightly beyond the body, providing a stable area for placing items such as lamps or books. The sides and back are plain, with no additional detailing or hardware, emphasizing its minimalist aesthetic. The legs are straight and integrated into the frame, offering sturdy support while maintaining a streamlined appearance. The overall finish is smooth and uniform, with no visible decorative elements or embellishments.
description: A minimalist nightstand with two drawers, round knobs, and a smooth, flat top. Its clean lines and plain surfaces give it a modern, functional look.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with centered round knobs and a flat top surface.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the plain, flat side panel and the slight overhang of the top surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a featureless, flat back panel with no hardware or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain side and top overhang.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
